title: melilotus officinalis var. maximus
intro: Melilotus officinalis var. maximus, also known as tall melilot or greater melilot, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of coumarin, a compound with anticoagulant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Traditionally, Melilotus officinalis var. maximus is used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with certain medications.
